title: Account Defaults
description: Account/environment-level defaults a customer fills ONCE (from AWS console view access) and reuses for every RDS for Db2 deployment in that account. The skill merges these into each deployment intent; any value named in the prompt overrides the matching default. Every field is OPTIONAL in this file, but region, kms_key_id, master_user_secret_kms_key_id, db_subnet_group_name, monitoring_role_arn, and the IBM identifiers are REQUIRED in a deployable intent: a per-deployment intent reuses existing resources, so these must already exist. If they do not exist yet, the gitops/CI account bootstraps them ONCE by applying the 1-networking / 3-kms / 2-iam modules, then records the resulting names/ARNs here. Field names match the deployment-intent field names exactly so the merge is a straight copy. No secrets belong in this file (no master password, no AWS keys).

schema_version.description: Version of this account-defaults file format.

_about.description: Free-text note for humans; ignored by the skill.

region.description: Default AWS region for deployments in this account (e.g. us-east-1).

vpc_id.description: VPC the DB lives in (VPC console). Always customer-owned — the skill never creates a VPC. Required by the 5-rds and 1-networking modules.

db_subnet_group_name.description: Existing DB subnet group to reuse (RDS console -> Subnet groups). If none exists, the gitops account creates one ONCE via the 1-networking module, then records its name here.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: Existing security group id(s) to reuse (VPC console -> Security groups). The skill opens only TCP 50443 from your ingress sources on these. If none exists, the gitops account creates one ONCE via 1-networking, then records its id here.

kms_key_id.description: Customer-managed MULTI-REGION KMS key (MRK) ARN for storage encryption (key id starts with 'mrk-'). Reused across deployments. If none exists, the gitops account creates one ONCE via the 3-kms module, then records its ARN here.

master_user_secret_kms_key_id.description: MRK CMK ARN encrypting the RDS-managed master-user secret. Reused; create ONCE via 3-kms if absent. Needed with managed master credentials.

monitoring_role_arn.description: Existing IAM role ARN for RDS Enhanced Monitoring to reuse. If none exists, the gitops account creates one ONCE via the 2-iam module, then records its ARN here.

ingress_cidrs.description: Source CIDR range(s) allowed to reach Db2 SSL port 50443 (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16). 0.0.0.0/0 is rejected unless acknowledged.

ibm_customer_id.description: IBM Passport Advantage customer id (from IBM, not AWS). Low-sensitivity; masked by the skill. Required for every edition.

ibm_site_id.description: IBM Passport Advantage site id (from IBM, not AWS). Low-sensitivity; masked by the skill. Required for every edition.

tags.description: Default customer tags for every resource. Provide at least Project and Owner; Environment is set from the tier.

gitops_aws_account_id.description: Informational only: the account whose CI role runs terraform apply (and the one-time bootstrap). Used for an identity sanity check; never written into the intent or tfvars.
